src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.general_idea: Introduce a static constant for the current date to ensure consistent temporal context across the application.
src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.human_impl: public static final LocalDate NOW = LocalDate.now();

src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.general_idea: Move field initialization into a static block to allow conditional logic for determining the base folder path.
Allow the base folder path to be overridden via a system property for flexibility in different environments.
Add the @EnableScheduling annotation to activate Spring's task scheduling support.
Change indentation from tabs to spaces to conform to standard Java formatting conventions.
Added a new endpoint to retrieve company profile information.
Added optional 'quarterly' parameter to existing financial data endpoints to support quarterly data retrieval.
Refactored EPS calculation to derive it from net income and shares outstanding instead of using a pre-calculated field.
Added a new endpoint to retrieve EPS excluding R&D expenses.
Added a new endpoint to retrieve EPS excluding marketing expenses.
Added a new endpoint to retrieve EBITDA per share.
Added a new endpoint to retrieve net income data.
Refactored operating margin calculation to derive it from operating income and revenue instead of using a remote ratio.
Added a new endpoint to retrieve operating free cash flow margin.
Added dependency on FlagProvider list to support flag information in the controller.
Added imports for new domain classes and services used in the expanded controller functionality.
Add a field to store the latest stock price in USD.
Add a field to store the latest stock price in the trading currency.
Add a field to store the date of the latest price using java.time.LocalDate.
Add a field to store the company profile information.
Add a field to indicate data quality issues.
Update the constructor to accept and initialize the new fields.
src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.human_impl: public CompanyFinancials(double latestPrice, double latestPriceUsd, double latestPriceTradingCurrency, LocalDate latestPriceDate, List<FinancialsTtm> financials, Profile profile, int dataQualityIssue)

src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.general_idea: Add a field to store the stock price in the trading currency.
Add a field to store the stock price in USD.
Add a field to store auxiliary information associated with the financials.
Remove the remote ratio field as it is no longer needed in this domain object.
Remove the key metrics field as it is no longer needed in this domain object.
Remove the profile field as it is no longer needed in this domain object.
Add a default no-argument constructor for serialization or framework compatibility.
Add a copy constructor to create a new instance based on a latest report, with an option to keep TTM values.
Add a description field to the FxSymbol domain class to store human-readable currency information.
Introduce a parameterized constructor to initialize both code and description fields.
src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.human_impl: public FxSymbol(String code, String description) { this.code = code; this.description = description; }

src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.general_idea: Add a no-argument constructor to support frameworks requiring default instantiation.
Initialize the public list field with an empty immutable list to prevent null pointer exceptions and ensure a safe default state.
Initialize currency field with empty string to prevent null pointer exceptions.
Change fullTimeEmployees from primitive long to Long object to support null values.
Add reportedCurrency field to store the currency in which financials are reported.
Add currencySymbol field to store the symbol for the currency.
Implement the DateAware interface to enable date-based searching functionality for the data element.
src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.human_impl: public class SimpleDataElement implements DateAware { ... public LocalDate getDate() { return LocalDate.parse(date); } }

src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.general_idea: Add a toString method to provide a readable string representation of the object for debugging or logging.
src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.human_impl: public String toString() { return "SimpleDataElement [date=" + date + ", value=" + value + "]"; }

src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.general_idea: Add explicit check for non-finite floating-point results to return NaN instead of propagating Infinity or NaN from the calculation.
src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.human_impl: if (Double.isFinite(result)) { return result; } else { return Double.NaN; }

src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.general_idea: Removed Spring Framework @Service and @Autowired annotations to decouple the class from the Spring container.
src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.human_impl: Removed `@Service` class annotation and `@Autowired` field annotation.

src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.general_idea: Converted the class and its main method to static to allow usage without instantiation, consistent with removing Spring dependency injection.
Changed the dependency on `CpiAdjustor` from an injected instance field to a static method call on the `CpiAdjustor` class.
Added a check to ensure the calculated result is a finite number, returning null for NaN or Infinity values to prevent downstream errors.
src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.human_impl: Added `if (!Double.isFinite(result)) { return null; }` before returning the result.

src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.general_idea: Renamed the `offset` parameter to `offsetIndex` to better describe its purpose as an index into the list.
src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.human_impl: Changed parameter name from `offset` to `offsetIndex` in method signature and usage.

src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.general_idea: Reordered method parameters to place `years` before `offsetIndex`, likely for better logical grouping or API consistency.
src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.human_impl: Changed signature from `(List<FinancialsTtm> financials, int offset, int years)` to `(List<FinancialsTtm> financials, int years, int offsetIndex)`.

src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.general_idea: Convert instance fields and methods to static to remove statefulness and constructor initialization.

src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.general_idea: Replace custom CpiData domain object with generic DataValuePairData for CPI storage.
Load historical CPI data from a classpath CSV resource to extend the date range back to 1913.
Utilize InputStream.readAllBytes() introduced in Java 9 to simplify reading resource content.
Update the file path for the primary CPI data source to match new naming conventions.
